summary: This startup was closed due to the owner not complying with the terms of DWP funding.
achievements: Created a mobile app in flutter where users could place orders, pay and keep track of their delivery
Used Christofides travelling salesman algorithm to work out an efficient route to optimise delivery times, this also utilised live traffic data, construction information etc...
Developed an admin panel that powered the mobile app, could view orders, track delivery riders/ drivers.
